name: ml-experiment
description: Parallel model comparison: 3 experimenters → synthesizer picks winner

roles.description: Tests approach 1 (e.g., random forest / traditional ML), logs metrics and findings
Tests approach 2 (e.g., gradient boosting / ensemble), logs metrics and findings
Tests approach 3 (e.g., neural network / deep learning), logs metrics and findings
Reads all experiment results, picks winner, writes comparison report

tasks.title: Run experiment 1: traditional ML approach (e.g., random forest)
Run experiment 2: ensemble approach (e.g., gradient boosting)
Run experiment 3: deep learning approach (e.g., neural network)
Compare all experiment results, pick winner, write comparison report
